related.name: Apollo
related.teaser: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.

related.name: Diamond
related.teaser: Crown is the open sky—pure presence pervading all forms.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Surya
related.teaser: Surya embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: XIX. The Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is pure illumination — radiant joy and vital force shining clarity into all things.

related.name: Ra
related.teaser: Ra embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.
